meaning: n.榻愭櫘璧涜(浣嶄簬浼︽暒)
examples: This tailor, Lifschnitz, kept a repair shop in a Cheapside basement, underneath a cobbler.
'If they had enough uncles to fill Cheapside,' cried Bing - ley, 'it wouldn't make them any less charming!'
Other photos in the collection show a horse-drawn carriage and pedestrians at Cheapside, London's financial centre, in 1909.
